title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS TWENTY-FIVE AND TWENTY-SIX OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE HUNDRED EIGHTY-THREE, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CHARTER OF PASAY CITY, AS AMENDED.

chunks.text:
S. No. 1123 H. No. 18817 / 66 OG No. 17, 4242 (April 27, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6088, August 04, 1969 ]

AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS TWENTY-FIVE AND TWENTY-SIX OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE HUNDRED EIGHTY-THREE, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CHARTER OF PASAY CITY, AS AMENDED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Section 1. The first paragraph of Section twenty-five of Republic Act Numbered One hundred eighty-three, as amended, is further amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 25.

The City Fiscal

â

His powers and duties.

â There shall be a City Fiscal who shall be the chief of the Law Department of the city, a first assistant city fiscal who shall be assistant chief, a second assistant city fiscal, three third assistant city fiscals, four fourth assistant city fiscals, five fifth assistant city fiscals and five sixth assistant city fiscals, who shall discharge their duties under the general supervision of the Secretary of Justice. The City Fiscal shall be the chief legal adviser of the city and all offices and department thereof. He shall have the following powers and duties:"
